html:
Exclusive to:

Scrap is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can be obtained by rummaging through Junk Piles or destroying Junky Fence with a 25% chance. After Lunar Rifts are activated, it can also be obtained by hammering Abandoned Junk which appear in Junk Yard (if Scrappy Werepig is not alive).

Scrap is used to craft and upgrade the Lunar Siphonator. After the activation of Lunar Rifts, it can be used to craft the Auto-Mat-O-Chanic, W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear, and W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor after learning the corresponding rare Blueprints which dropped from Abandoned Junk and Scrappy Werepig.

Like Gears, repairing Broken Clockworks in the Ruins with 3 Scraps will spawn a friendly damaged chess monster (Damaged Bishop, Damaged Knight, or Damaged Rook).

Tips

  • Scrap can easily be farmed renewably by periodically going to the Junk Yard and hammering the Junky Fences and Abandoned Junk.

Trivia

  • Scrap was introduced in the Host of Horrors Update.
  • Before the Scrappy Scavengers Update, Scrap was not available outside of the Lunar Rifts, and was not used for the Lunar Siphonator.
  • On initial beta release, Scrap could be eaten by WX-78. This was not intended and removed in Update 575729. It has food type Gears (Health - 60, Sanity - 50, Hunger - 75)

Exclusive to:
“I bet I could make something incredibly scientific with this.”
–Wilson
“What am I supposed to do with that?”
–Willow
“Funny metal bits.”
–Wolfgang
“Only parts of a greater whole. Just like me.”
–Wendy
“HELLO MY BEAUTIES”
–WX-78
“Where are the instructions?”
–Wickerbottom
“Some odd bits of metal.”
–Woodie
“Someone should collect this bric-à-brac and put it to use.”
–Maxwell
“What use wöuld a warriör have för such leavings?”
–Wigfrid
“We love puzzles!”
–Webber
“Ingredients for some sort of machine?”
–Warly
“Robot buildy bits?”
–Wormwood
“Don't let its looks fool you, these are some high-quality parts!”
–Winona
“I'll have to settle for these scraps of metal.”
–Wortox
“Blegh. Not food.”
–Wurt
“Oooh, nice! Wonder what we can do with these.”
–Walter
“Gears and wires and sprockets, oh my!”
–Wanda
Scrap is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can be obtained by rummaging through Junk Piles or destroying Junky Fence with a 25% chance. After Lunar Rifts are activated, it can also be obtained by hammering Abandoned Junk which appear in Junk Yard (if Scrappy Werepig is not alive).
Scrap is used to craft and upgrade the Lunar Siphonator. After the activation of Lunar Rifts, it can be used to craft the Auto-Mat-O-Chanic, W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear, and W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor after learning the corresponding rare Blueprints which dropped from Abandoned Junk and Scrappy Werepig.
Like Gears, repairing Broken Clockworks in the Ruins with 3 Scraps will spawn a friendly damaged chess monster (Damaged Bishop, Damaged Knight, or Damaged Rook).

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Phế liệu là một Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong From Beyond. Nó có thể nhận được bằng cách lục lọi Đống Rác hoặc phá hủy Hàng Rác Rác với 25% cơ hội. Sau khi Lunar Rifts được kích hoạt, nó cũng có thể thu được bằng cách đập Rác Bị Bỏ Rơi xuất hiện trong Bãi Rác (nếu Lợn Sói Scrappy không còn sống).
